live_fetch_status: During automated POC runs from this environment, listing HTML/JSON was often replaced by ShieldSquare / hCaptcha validation flows (see YAD2_FEASIBILITY_REPORT.md). Representative JSON objects were therefore authored for schema-mapping exercises and are not asserted as verbatim API responses from Yad2.

files.extraction_meta.json: POC script output from extract_samples.py (may show zero items when bot wall active)
files.batch_listings_redacted.json: aggregated synthetic projections for quick review
